description_long: This is a single-story bungalow with a rectangular footprint and a flat roof, featuring multiple rooms visible through large windows and open wall sections. The exterior is predominantly white, with some rooms displaying patterned wallpaper and interior furnishings such as tables and chairs. The front facade includes several large windows and a main entrance, while the rear and side elevations show a mix of smaller windows and solid wall sections. The layout suggests a modern, open-plan design with interconnected living spaces and private rooms. The roof is flat, and there is no visible porch or veranda. The window arrangement is asymmetrical, with grouped windows on the front and sides.
description: A modern, single-story white bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, and an open-plan interior layout. The exterior features asymmetrical window groupings and patterned interior walls.
description_view_0: Front view showing large windows, the main entrance, and patterned interior walls.
description_view_1: Side/rear view with fewer windows, more solid wall sections, and a glimpse of interior furnishings.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting grouped windows, open living spaces, and visible tables and chairs inside.
description_view_3: Side view with a mix of small windows, patterned wallpaper, and solid exterior walls.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped front and side windows
